prose.en: Providers MUST document the cryptographic modules used in each service (or groups of services that use the same modules) where cryptographic services are used to protect federal customer data, including whether these modules are validated under the NIST Cryptographic Module Validation Program or are update streams of such modules.

required-artifacts: List of cryptographic modules including whether these modules are validated under the NIST Cryptographic Module Validation Program or are update streams of such modules.
